title: rhamnus rubra var. obtusissima
intro: Rhamnus rubra var. obtusissima, also known as the Red Dogwood or Red Osier Dogwood, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Rhamnus rubra var. obtusissima include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
